# Copilot Instructions - Application.MindNova

All engineering instructions for this repository live in **`/AGENTS.md`** at the repo root.
Follow it as the single source of truth: build and test commands, architecture, tech stack,
conventions (API design, controllers, logging, security, model placement, testing), and the
Bicep property-ordering guide.

GitHub Copilot reads `AGENTS.md` natively, so this file intentionally only points there to
keep the two from diverging. Do not add rules here - add or change them in `AGENTS.md`.
